## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

Closes #(issue number)

## Changes

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality
- [ ] CI/CD update

## Description

More detailed description of the changes made. Include:
- What changed and why
- Any trade-offs or design decisions
- Areas that might need careful review

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes:
- [ ] `cargo test --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] Manually tested with provider: ___
- [ ] Manually tested with channel: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's Rust style (no clippy warnings)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / docs/ / code comments)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, tokens) in the code
